vocabulary.translation: to love; to be fond of; to like; affection; to be inclined (to do sth); to tend to (happen)
Beijing, capital of the People's Republic of China
root; stem; origin; source; this; the current; original; inherent; originally; classifier for books, periodicals, files etc
no; not so; (bound form) not; un-
you're welcome; don't mention it; impolite; rude; blunt
dish (type of food); vegetable; cuisine; (coll.) (one's) type; (of one's skills etc) weak; poor
to eat; to consume; to eat at (a cafeteria etc); to eradicate; to destroy; to absorb; to suffer (shock, injury, defeat etc)
big; large; great; older (than another person); eldest (as in 姐); greatly; freely; fully; (dialect) father; (dialect) uncle (father's brother)
of; ~'s (possessive particle); (used after an attribute); (used to form a nominal expression); (used at the end of a declarative sentence for emphasis); also pr. [dì] or [di] in poetry and songs

point; dot; drop; speck; o'clock; point (in space or time); to draw a dot; to check on a list; to choose; to order (food in a restaurant); to touch briefly; to hint; to light; to ignite; to pour a liquid drop by drop; (old) one fifth of a two-hour watch 更; dot stroke in Chinese characters; classifier for items
I'm sorry; excuse me; I beg your pardon; to let (sb) down; to disappoint
many; much; too many; in excess; (after a numeral) ... odd; how (to what extent) (Taiwan pr. [duó]); (bound form) multi-; poly-
happy; glad; willing (to do sth); in a cheerful mood
to work; (of a machine) to operate; job; work; task

good; appropriate; proper; all right!; (before a verb) easy to; (before a verb) good to; (before an adjective for exclamatory effect) so; (verb complement indicating completion); (of two people) close; on intimate terms; (after a personal pronoun) hello
the back; the rear; the last bit; behind; near the end; at the back; later; afterwards
to circle; to go back; to turn around; to answer; to return; to revolve; Hui ethnic group (Chinese Muslims); time; classifier for acts of a play; section or chapter (of a classic book)
can; to have the skill; to know how to; to be likely to; to be sure to; to meet; to get together; meeting; gathering; (suffix) union; group; association; (bound form) a moment (Taiwan pr. [huǐ])
used in 家伙 and 家俱
to shout; to call; to order; to ask; to be called; by (indicates agent in the passive mood)

to open (transitive or intransitive); (of ships, vehicles, troops etc) to start; to turn on; to put in operation; to operate; to run; to boil; to write out (a prescription, check, invoice etc); (directional complement) away; off; carat (gold); abbr. for Kelvin, 开尔文; abbr. for 开本, book format
to look after; to take care of; to watch; to guard
to see; to catch sight of
lump; chunk; piece; classifier for pieces of cloth, cake, soap etc; (coll.) classifier for money and currency units

to come; (used as a substitute for a more specific verb); hither (directional complement for motion toward the speaker, as in 回来); ever since (as in 自古以来); for the past (amount of time); (prefix) the coming ...; the next ... (as in 来世); (between two verbs) in order to; (after a round number) approximately; (used after 得 to indicate possibility, as in 谈得来, or after 不 to indicate impossibility, as in 吃不来)
(completed action marker); (modal particle indicating change of state, situation now); (modal particle intensifying preceding clause)

zero; nought; zero sign; fractional; fragmentary; odd (of numbers); (placed between two numbers to indicate a smaller quantity followed by a larger one); fraction; (in mathematics) remainder (after division); extra; to wither and fall; to wither
(negative prefix for verbs) have not; not

particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?"); particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?"); particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?"); (at the end of a declarative sentence) particle indicating continuation of a state or action; particle indicating strong affirmation
you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您)
ahead; in front; preceding; above; also pr. [qián mian]
to ask; to invite; please (do sth); to treat (to a meal etc); to request

to go; to go to (a place); (of a time etc) last; just passed; to send; to remove; to get rid of; to reduce; to be apart from in space or time; to die (euphemism); to play (a part); (when used either before or after a verb) to go in order to do sth; (after a verb of motion indicates movement away from the speaker); (used after certain verbs to indicate detachment or separation)
to warm up; to heat up; hot (of weather); heat; fervent
to know; to recognize; to be familiar with; to get acquainted with sb; knowledge; understanding; awareness; cognition
few; less; to lack; to be missing; to stop (doing sth); seldom
time; length of time; moment; period
to be (followed by substantives only); correct; right; true; (respectful acknowledgement of a command) very well; (adverb for emphatic assertion)
to go to bed; to sleep
to speak; to say; to talk; to gossip; to tell stories; talk; word
variant of 岁, year; years old
he; him (used for either sex when the sex is unknown or unimportant); (used before sb's name for emphasis); (used as a meaningless mock object); (literary) other
to study at the same school; fellow student; classmate
to like; to be fond of
down; downwards; below; lower; later; next (week etc); second (of two parts); to decline; to go down; to arrive at (a decision, conclusion etc); measure word to show the frequency of an action
teacher; gentleman; sir; mister (Mr.); husband; (dialect) doctor
now; at present; at the moment; modern; current; nowadays
to think (about); to think of; to devise; to think (that); to believe (that); to desire; to want (to); to miss (feel wistful about the absence of)
classifier indicating a small amount or small number greater than 1: some, a few, several
week; day of the week; Sunday

one; single; a (article); as soon as; entire; whole; all; throughout; "one" radical in Chinese characters (Kangxi radical 1); also pr. [yāo] for greater clarity when spelling out numbers digit by digit
to have; there is; (bound form) having; with; -ful; -ed; -al (as in 意 intentional)
to exist; to be alive; (of sb or sth) to be (located) at; (used before a verb to indicate an action in progress)
how?; how about?; how was it?; how are things?
(pronoun) this; these; (bound form) this; the (followed by a noun); (bound form) this; these (followed by a classifier) (in this sense, commonly pr. [zhèi], esp. in Beijing)
to live; to dwell; to stay; to reside; to stop; (suffix indicating firmness, steadiness, or coming to a halt)
letter; symbol; character; word; courtesy or style name traditionally given to males aged 20 in dynastic China

to make; to produce; to write; to compose; to do; to engage in; to hold (a party etc); (of a person) to be (an intermediary, a good student etc); to become (husband and wife, friends etc); (of a thing) to serve as; to be used for; to assume (an air or manner)
